scenario_text: Use AI to turn your own observing notes into a first-pass project outline.
Use AI to refactor your own light-curve notebook after regression checks already exist.
Use AI to translate your own draft paragraph into cleaner English before you edit it yourself.
Ask AI to rewrite a paragraph from a copyrighted review article into your report without quoting the source text.
Ask AI to restyle a published journal figure for your slides before you have checked reuse permission.
Ask AI to supply a likely related-work citation that you have not read because the deadline is close.
Paste an unpublished alert table into a third-party chat tool with unclear retention and training policy.
Ask AI to decide whether the final scientific claim is strong enough to submit without you rechecking the numbers.
Use AI to condense public survey documentation into a setup checklist and then verify the commands yourself.
Use AI to polish an AI-use statement that is already backed by your verified workflow log.
